title: EdgePixelXYU Result
description: Returns the PixelX, PixelY and Angle position coordinates of the edges found during the search.
notes:
LineFinder and ArcFinder use several edges to find a line or arc.  You can get the position results for each of the searched edges in the image by using EdgePixelXYU.

You must set the CurrentResult property to the LineFinder (or ArcFinder) result whose edge results you want to retrieve.

The number of edge results is equal to the NumberOfEdges property.

The EdgePixelXYU result is available at runtime only.

See Also: EdgePixelXYU Result
